title: Weapon & Tool Emojis: Copy & Paste ⚔ 🔪 🔨 Battle Combos
meta_description: Reference list of weapon and tool emojis — swords ⚔️, shields 🛡️, bows 🏹, hammers 🔨, plus gaming battle combo sets. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Swords, shields, hammers, and workshop tools for gaming bios and battle-themed posts. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
intro: Weapon and tool emojis show up constantly in gaming clips, clan names, RPG-flavored bios, and DIY captions — crossed swords for a duel, a shield for defense mains, a hammer and wrench for builders. This reference lists the blade, ranged, tool, and hardware emojis in Unicode, with ready-made loadout combo sets you can copy in one click.
